findings.message: Command file has no YAML frontmatter; name field is absent
Command file has no YAML frontmatter; description field is absent
Multi-step command that reads files and runs shell commands has no allowed-tools declaration; tool-level sandboxing cannot be enforced
Command uses $ARGUMENTS but has no guard for the empty-input case; behavior on bare invocation is undefined
Command references absolute developer-local path `/Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/`; will fail for all other contributors
Command hardcodes /Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/ as the OfficeCLI source directory; non-functional on all non-author machines
package-assistant.md acknowledges the YAML-comment-breaks-parser bug but the 7 officecli-* skills are still broken, creating a persistent doc-vs-code mismatch
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; name field is absent and agent cannot be registered by Claude Code
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; description field is absent
Agent specifies no output format; Claude response structure will be unpredictable
Agent has zero worked examples; expected invocation and output are undefined
Agent has no model pin; Claude Code will use default model selection
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; name field is absent and agent cannot be registered by Claude Code
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; description field is absent
Agent specifies no output format; Claude response structure will be unpredictable
Agent has zero worked examples; expected invocation and output are undefined
Agent has no model pin; Claude Code will use default model selection
Both example agents in hello-world-extension were not updated when the frontmatter convention was adopted; contributors using these as templates will produce non-conforming agents
Script header documents its own canonical install method as `curl -fsSL .../install-ubuntu.sh | bash`; the script is the target of that curl-pipe-sh invocation

Skill instructs: `curl -s https://skills.aionui.com/SKILL.md > ~/.config/aionui-skills/SKILL.md` — fetches remote content to a local config path with no integrity verification; a compromised CDN could deliver malicious skill instructions
Skill instructs Claude to pipe a remote shell script directly to bash with no integrity check
Skill instructs Claude to pipe a remote PowerShell script directly to Invoke-Expression on Windows
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside `---` block breaks parser; compounded by repeated version headers in document body corrupting section structure
Version comment appears 5+ times as H1 headings in the body, corrupting the document section structure
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center

Skill instructs Claude to pipe a remote shell script directly to bash with no integrity check — Code block reads: `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI/main/install.sh | bash` in the Install section; Claude Code agents following this skill will execute this verbatim

Skill instructs Claude to pipe a remote PowerShell script directly to Invoke-Expression on Windows — Code block reads: `irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI/main/install.ps1 | iex` — PowerShell download-and-execute with no integrity check
Script header documents its own canonical install method as `curl -fsSL .../install-ubuntu.sh | bash`; the script is the target of that curl-pipe-sh invocation

Skill instructs: `curl -s https://skills.aionui.com/SKILL.md > ~/.config/aionui-skills/SKILL.md` — fetches remote content to a local config path with no integrity verification; a compromised CDN could deliver malicious skill instructions

Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; name field is absent and agent cannot be registered by Claude Code — File opens with `You are an AI assistant` prose at line 1; no `---` delimiter present anywhere in the file
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; description field is absent — No frontmatter block present; description field is absent
Agent specifies no output format; Claude response structure will be unpredictable — No `## Output` or equivalent output-format section found anywhere in the file
Agent has zero worked examples; expected invocation and output are undefined — No `## Examples` section or equivalent found anywhere in the file
Agent has no model pin; Claude Code will use default model selection — No model field present (frontmatter absent entirely)
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; name field is absent and agent cannot be registered by Claude Code — File opens with prose at line 1; no `---` delimiter present anywhere in the file
Agent file has no YAML frontmatter block; description field is absent — No frontmatter block present; description field is absent
Agent specifies no output format; Claude response structure will be unpredictable — No `## Output` or equivalent output-format section found anywhere in the file
Agent has zero worked examples; expected invocation and output are undefined — No `## Examples` section or equivalent found anywhere in the file
Agent has no model pin; Claude Code will use default model selection — No model field present (frontmatter absent entirely)
Command file has no YAML frontmatter; name field is absent — File opens with a markdown heading at line 1; no `---` delimiter present
Command file has no YAML frontmatter; description field is absent — No frontmatter block present; description field is absent
Multi-step command that reads files and runs shell commands has no allowed-tools declaration; tool-level sandboxing cannot be enforced
Command uses $ARGUMENTS but has no guard for the empty-input case; behavior on bare invocation is undefined

Command references absolute developer-local path `/Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/`; will fail for all other contributors — Line contains `/Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/` — macOS-specific absolute home-directory path belonging to the original author

YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — package-assistant.md explicitly states: 'Skills with # officecli: vX.X.X comments inside the YAML frontmatter block break AionUi\'s parser, causing skills to not appear in Skills Center'
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md documentation
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md documentation

YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside `---` block breaks parser; compounded by repeated version headers in document body corrupting section structure — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md; additionally the version string appears as H1 headers in the body 5+ times
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md documentation
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.24` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md documentation
YAML comment `# officecli: v1.0.23` inside the `---` block breaks AionUi's frontmatter parser; skill invisible in Skills Center — Same pattern confirmed by package-assistant.md documentation

Version comment appears 5+ times as H1 headings in the body, corrupting the document section structure — Multiple occurrences of `# officecli: v1.0.23` found as H1 section headings throughout the body, producing spurious top-level headings that corrupt the document outline

Command hardcodes /Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/ as the OfficeCLI source directory; non-functional on all non-author machines — Line contains `/Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/` — absolute macOS home-directory path belonging to the original author

package-assistant.md acknowledges the YAML-comment-breaks-parser bug but the 7 officecli-* skills are still broken, creating a persistent doc-vs-code mismatch — Command documents the officecli frontmatter YAML comment bug as a known issue but 7 affected SKILL.md files remain unpatched

Both example agents in hello-world-extension were not updated when the frontmatter convention was adopted; contributors using these as templates will produce non-conforming agents — Both agent files under examples/hello-world-extension/agents/ lack frontmatter while all production agents in the repo have frontmatter
